productName: Smokiez Sour Midnight Prickly Pear Trifecta CBN:CBD:THC 1:1:1 Fruit Chews
description: Artisan tangy, mouth-watering sour chews with a slow-melting bite, vibrant fruit character, and a smooth infused finish that keeps the flavor front and center. It blends CBN to help you relax and ease into rest, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and THC for a classic euphoric lift in a 1:1:1 ratio. Perfect for winding down at the end of the day.
